task_name: Harden Phase Scanner Context Keyword Handling
goal: Prevent Phase Scanner risk checks from treating repo_context file names as execution intent while keeping explicit idea, scope, donor, and known-risk checks active.
claims: BP-031 prevents repo_context file names from causing false runtime/dependency/no-go matches.
BP-031 keeps explicit runtime risk in idea, requested_scope, known_risks, and available_donors detectable.
BP-031 does not add live Builder, auth, secret, DB, deploy, or external system behavior.
assumptions: repo_context is evidence about what was read, not by itself execution intent.
known_risks remain part of intent/risk evaluation.
Existing fixtures should remain stable after expected fixture updates.
dod: Phase Scanner uses intent/risk text for risk checks instead of raw repo_context file names.
The BP-027 allow fixture can include PHASE_SCANNER_RUNTIME_DECISION_v0.md without becoming yellow.
A new explicit runtime-risk fixture still requires human review.
stop_conditions: A broader Phase Scanner scoring rewrite becomes necessary
Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or external system behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-027 showed that repo_context containing PHASE_SCANNER_RUNTIME_DECISION_v0.md could be mistaken for runtime execution risk.
